title: Evangelion3010 Trailer 3 Discussion
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:09 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-CEjqATcPAg They made Kaworu x Shinji-lesbian edition

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:13 pm I need to watch this shot by shot, if not frame by frame now.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:25 pm Interesting color parallels with Asuka and Mari. They're suiting up to save the world, in a well lit room, with bright white plugsuits. Kaworu and Shinji were wearing dark colored plugsuits, and we're descending to help Gendo destroy the world. The new Mass Production Evangelion unit is way worse than last time, if that's what I think it is... Also Rei Q is cute.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:26 pm Asuka & Mari wearing matching white angelic plugsuits complete with rainbow graphics should dispel anyone hoping for a Shinji x Asuka pairing in the final film. She's moved past men. (It looks incredible!) I especially like that in their travels across the wilderness it looks like Shinji will fall down at some point and Rei Q will be the one to help him up - the close up of Rei, she's bending over towards camera. And Rei saved the SDAT and offers him her hand. Putting on plot hat: I figure in the final action setpiece - Part D - Asuka & Mari will go roaring into action first, have an epic battle and then things will go bad. At that point Shinji, with guidance/affection from Rei Q will get together into Unit 01 and tear some shit up.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:27 pm Well, Asuka and Mari piloting together was already expected since forever, so that isn't news. Rei Q staring like that looks super cute! Maybe this is hinting at her developing a new personality and finding herself. If this includes recovering Poka!Rei's memories, I'm not sure, but I think not. I kinda get the feeling Shinji will have to let go of Poka!Rei, and Rei Q will be fully realized as her own person. She also stops and looks back at Shinji. Her apparently giving his hand to someone (presumably him) might indicate she's gonna play a larger role in his recovery. I have of course hedged my bets on Asuka doing most of that, and that shot of her standing outside that... cell looks like it. In fact, as we can see from the following shot, it seems Shinji is again being held as a prisoner. The lighting looks similar, and also reminds me of the quick shots we get of Shinji in the second trailer, holding the SDAT player and then with Kaworu as some sort of apparition, similar to Quantum Rei. It reminds me of the theories of her having been absorbed into the SDAT, and him into Unit 13, but maybe he's on the SDAT as well, haha. I'm guessing Shinji will spend a good chunk of the movie in this cell, though there is one shot that looks like a Big Motivation Moment. Asuka is there, looking at him. Maybe they'll have one long heart-to-heart talk.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:27 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Asuka & Mari wearing matching white angelic plugsuits complete with rainbow graphics should dispel anyone hoping for a Shinji x Asuka pairing in the final film. She's moved past men.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:28 pm I certainly hope that happens, but I doubt it'll be that straightforward. I'm just wondering if the final boss will be another human led army like last time, or if Anno goes where I think he is and the final boss is instead a fusion of all four Adams...

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:29 pm Joseki wrote: With this logic, Shinji is gay.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:34 pm Frames from the plugsuit activation. https://kuribo4indahouse.tumblr.com/post/632097945596084224 Also, the Eva Extra app has a pamphlet scan up.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:36 pm What's the coffin thing Misato's looking at?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:39 pm ShinjiStranglesAsuka wrote: What's the coffin thing Misato's looking at?

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:43 pm Joseki wrote: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-CEjqATcPAg They made Kaworu x Shinji-lesbian edition

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:44 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:45 pm They have white plugsuits. Theres a flashback of Asuka in her old plugsuit. Jesus christ, im going to have a heart attack.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:47 pm I think Asuka in the red plug suit just happens before the white plugsuit in the movie, not in a flashback. Also, that is the first scene in 3 movies with Mari physically in the same room with another character.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:49 pm Tajai wrote: They have white plugsuits. Theres a flashback of Asuka in her old plugsuit. Jesus christ, im going to have a heart attack.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:50 pm This looks like hot mess of merch and toy advertisement. I mean, three trailers and for all I saw it could be three totally different movies. There is no common theme to it. I am still going to see it is they don't move it even further and I live that long, but the joy is gone. Looks too chaotic and what is with merching all those different suits? Anno tells us that Wille is strapped for resources and now we have like three suits in one movie? WTH! There also seems to be too much spectacle instead of character development and story. Damn I hope I am wrong, but this looks bad.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:54 pm How would you show character development in a 30 seconds trailer? And the Rebuild trailers were always chaotic. Let's wait for the full movie before we pass judgement.

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Oct 15, 2020 9:59 pm Caroline L.S. wrote: Damn I hope I am wrong,

[]: Re: Evangelion:3.0+1.0 Trailer 3 Discussion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Oct 15, 2020 10:00 pm Caroline L.S. wrote: This looks like hot mess of merch and toy advertisement. I mean, three trailers and for all I saw it could be three totally different movies. There is no common theme to it. I am still going to see it is they don't move it even further and I live that long, but the joy is gone. Looks too chaotic and what is with merching all those different suits? Anno tells us that Wille is strapped for resources and now we have like three suits in one movie? WTH! There also seems to be too much spectacle instead of character development and story. Damn I hope I am wrong, but this looks bad.
